name: EZLynx Insurance Rating & Agency Management API
what_it_does: EZLynx REST API for insurance comparative rating and agency management platform. Enables AI agents to submit insurance rating requests across multiple carriers simultaneously, retrieve comparative quotes for P&C insurance products, manage client and prospect records, handle policy download and carrier data sync, access commission tracking and agency analytics, manage renewal and cross-sell campaigns, integrate with carrier portals for real-time quoting, and connect agency data with carrier management and accounting systems.
use_cases: Submitting comparative rating requests across carriers from quoting automation agents
Managing insurance prospect and client records from agency CRM agents
Retrieving commission and policy data from agency analytics agents
Integrating carrier policy download data from data sync automation agents
not_for: Life and health insurance quoting without P&C comparative rating focus
Insurance carriers without independent agent distribution focus
Non-US insurance markets without US carrier integrations
best_when: An independent P&C insurance agency using EZLynx wants AI agents to automate comparative quoting across carriers, client record management, renewal tracking, and policy download synchronization.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Insurance rating and policy data includes personal financial and property information. Comparative quote data contains sensitive applicant information. Automated quoting must maintain accuracy of rating factors.

auth.notes: EZLynx uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Agency-level credentials with rating, client, and policy scopes. Developer portal for partner integrations. Acquired by Applied Systems (Applied Epic parent) in 2018. Integration with Applied Epic ecosystem.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — insurance agency subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-user pricing; plans based on agency size and features
pricing.notes: Lewisville, Texas. Founded 2003. Acquired by Applied Systems (Applied Epic parent) 2018. Major comparative rater for P&C independent agents. 35,000+ agencies. Carrier integrations with 300+ carriers. Competes with Vertafore Rating for comparative rating. Integration with Applied Epic for larger agency clients.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Insurance applicant and rating data is sensitive personal and financial information
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with partner program
Carrier rating responses vary — not all carriers support all coverage types via API
Applied Systems acquisition — API roadmap may consolidate with Applied Epic
Comparative rating accuracy critical — rating factor errors result in incorrect quotes
Policy download from carriers has carrier-specific data formats and timing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance rating and applicant data. SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Rating factor accuracy critical.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance applicant and rating data. SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency.
